properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 145/21

 BARENTS SEA
 1.A ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED BY THE FRENCH SPACE AGENCY AND SPACE AUTHORITY FROM FRENCH GUIANA SPACE CENTER IN THE PERIOD WITHIN 16 NOV TO 26 NOV BETWEEN 0932 UTC AND 1149 UTC.
 THE FOLLOWING HAZARDOUS ROCKET DEBRIS AREA HAS BEEN DECLARED:
 A. 70-36.0N 004-39.0W.
 B. 74-10.0N 026-51.0E.
 C. 73-27.0N 027-04.0E.
 D. 69-53.0N 004-29.0W.

 2.NAVIGATION IN THESE AREA WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED TIMFRAME MIGHT BE RELATED TO DANGER.

 3.CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 261500 UTC NOV 21.
